name: Kim Harkrider-Page
body: From start to finish, the process was easy and informative. I reached out on Nextdoor and took a chance on REPS of Texas. We inherited an old home that needs a lot of work. Dennis came out and reassured us that the job was not only doable, but it would be affordable and efficient. From day one he walked us through our options, recognized our hesitations and fears, and helped us find the right solution for what we needed. The crew was freaking amazing. It was done in one weekend and they acknowledged our dogs, would stop working so they could go out to use the bathroom and made sure they didn't get out of the gates. They are SUPER flexible, knowledgeable beyond what you think you know, kind, personable and honest. Our 70 plus year home that we inherited is now maintaining a constant temperature, not leaking and the squirrels are no longer bowling in our attic.

name: Valerie Marcano
body: We are very satisfied with the job that REPS did with our roof replacement. From the sales rep, project manager and roofing team, we have no complaints. The project manager even came by to ensure that every bit of trash was picked up.

name: Nathan Pennington
body: The folks did a great job of repairing a rotting patch in our roof and as of the last thunderstorm we've seen no signs of further leaking. Very quick to work and a great affordable price. Thank you.

name: Kelly Jackson
body: The team was professional, on time, and respectful of our property. They explained every step and completed the job faster than expected. Pricing was fair and communication was great. Highly recommend REPS.

name: Maria Hangval
body: Completed roof job efficiently and accurately within one day. Though it has not yet rained, they were very courteous saying, Call us back anytime, we are here for you. They also cleaned up the area upon completing the job which was greatly appreciated. Thank you.

name: Nick Vaglica
body: I have been working with Dennis for the better part of a year now and he has been incredible to work with throughout. Dennis is knowledgeable, personable, and above all has incredible integrity. Use him for your next project.

name: David Allenson
body: The absolute best. Very professional. And the work is quality. And pricing fair and reasonable. Will work with them again.

name: Alek Mellos
body: Best in Austin by far. They did a professional job, they were on time and it was easy to communicate. Highly recommended.
